title: Robustly Spiced Indian Sausages Chana Masala
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian dish featuring Italian fennel sausages in a rich and spicy chana masala sauce, perfect for a monsoon evening. This paleo-friendly recipe combines the best of Indian and Italian cuisines.

ingredients.name: Italian fennel sausages
ingredients.notes: preferably made with pork and fennel

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat and cook the Italian fennel sausages until browned on all sides.
Remove the sausages from the pan and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then saute the chopped onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the chana masala spice mix and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the tomato puree, ferment-jang, salt, and black pepper to the pan, and stir well.
Add the cooked sausages back to the pan and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the coconut cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce is creamy and the sausages are fully coated.
Serve the Robustly Spiced Indian Sausages Chana Masala hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
